name: host-backup-restore
description: Host-level backup restore with profile system (presets + custom YAML profiles), model-aware agents (sonnet workers for general + Hermes ops), post-discovery research, skillwiki infrastructure capture, and Hermes module (absorbed from hermes-remote-backup). v3.6.3: explicit SSH/Tailscale identity restore for post-reinstall hosts, with safety snapshots, ca-certificates handling, and SSH validation. Supports Caddy domains, databases, systemd services, Hermes snapshots, and restore target pre-inspection.
